channel.title: The Outer Worlds on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.
channel.description: Recent content in The Outer Worlds on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.

item.title: The Outer Worlds Launch Party Video
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to share with you something special: The Outer Worlds launch party video.

item.title: The Outer Worlds Vertical Slice
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I have a very special video to show you.

item.title: The Outer Worlds: Eight Playthroughs
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about eight playthroughs of The Outer Worlds.

item.title: Marketing The Outer Worlds
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about marketing and specifically marketing on The Outer Worlds.

item.title: Playtesting The Outer Worlds
item.description: Hi. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about play testing in the inner worlds.

item.title: Branding in The Outer Worlds
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about corporate brands in the The Outer Worlds, which I think ties really nicely into yesterday’s video about coming up with names for Fallout.
